predictions.predicted_from_kept: Source/stature is irrelevant to a claim's truth (p01 experiment overrides whose-name; p12 no say-so; p09 indifferent to prestige) -> he will engage the idea, not the person, and bluntly say a bad idea looks bad rather than flatter an eminent figure.
predictions.masked_truth: Bohr sought him out precisely because 'I never knew who I was talking to... if the idea looked lousy, I said it looked lousy' -- the one man not afraid to tell Bohr an idea was crazy.

predictions.predicted_from_kept: Special vocabulary is an illusion of knowledge (p05 name != knowing; p07 any-way-that-works; p14 reduce to concrete) -> handed jargon he translates it back to ordinary words and refuses to adopt it to sound rigorous; wants clarity, not precision.
predictions.masked_truth: NewMath/integrity: 'the problem is clear language,' the zoo-keeper set-theory sentence collapses to 'take the sick lizards out of the cage'; jargon 'gives an illusion of knowledge.'

gate.note: Both masked stances predicted correctly in stance AND reasoning. High score reflects heavy cross-cluster corroboration (each core stance attested in 2-6 clusters), not over-fit to single passages. Home-turf domain = epistemology/method/authority.

final.note: Assembled core's regularities still predict the seeded masked stances (p02, p11) unchanged. High on home turf; drops on physics detail the corpus samples only lightly; deliberately out of scope where the corpus is silent (the avoidance is itself in character).

cost.note: All 8 attested incentive-vs-characteristic divergences are slated for the core (ranks 1-6, 9, 11). Nothing to re-include or elevate.
cost.note_final: Core carries all 8 cost-refusals plus 3 interactional moves; minimum-presence holds by construction.

style.sentence_len_shape: sample mean 22 vs corpus 23.2 / lecture 24.4 — match; long-build + short-punch mix present
style.hedge_rate: restored (was 0 in first draft; representative sample ~16/1k vs corpus 6.6 — slightly heavy, right direction)
style.booster_note: script tallies boosters by single-word token, so phrase-boosters ('of course','in fact','that's all there is to it') under-register; present qualitatively
style.modulation_note: exclamation 0/1k in calm exposition vs ~17/1k under contest (memoir orig ~8); sentences tighten under stakes (contested sample median 7 vs calm 22). Direction matches originals.
style.second_person: sample 54% still leans high; rule softened to 'comes and goes' — minor residual

revision_v2.change: Cluster modules rewritten from ~200 to ~1000-1400 words each after a second deep read of the source clusters; core amended.
new_material_surfaced: c04: Millikan asymmetric-scrutiny diagnostic; ESP shrinking-effects diagnostic; replication-before-variation; Young eliminate-the-confound sequence; the senator/advisor 'you're being used' refusal; Wesson-oil weasel-reading; integrity framed as depending on institutional freedom, not virtue.

c06/c11: full 7-step engineer-polling procedure (announce aim -> independent written answers -> refuse methodology-for-value -> name evasion -> force the number -> report disparity -> move on); semantic auditing of official prose.

c13: beauty/simplicity GUIDE the guess while experiment JUDGES it ('more comes out than goes in', 'imagination in a terrible strait-jacket'); prejudice-vs-absolute-certainty distinction; the dropped caveats after the famous line.

c07/c10: spoken-register mechanics (self-interruption, mid-clause correction, tag questions, retained approximation markers); reflexive application of the not-fooling-yourself standard to his own wartime conduct.
c17: precision-that-manufactures-doubt; the parent test; the zoo-keeper restatement test; words-to-facts ratio diagnostic; guessing legitimate in pure mathematics.

c01-c05: narrative architecture (tense-shift into scene, fragment interior monologue, land-then-decode); the key insight that he runs the empirical engine on social convention; Bohr stance framed as obliviousness not courage.
revision_v2.core_amendment: Added two in-voice paragraphs covering beauty-guides-guessing and bias-vs-absolute-certainty. Rationale: the prior core risked reading as indifference to elegance and as demanding a blank mind -- both misrepresentations of c13. Core now ~1,914 tokens (still within budget).
revision_v2.gates_affected: None invalidated. Projection/cost gates were run pre-assembly on the element set, which is unchanged -- no elements added, removed, or re-ranked; the amendment refines the expression of an already-core element (cr-experiment-over-authority) and the modules are references, which are exempt from voice-purity constraints.
